name: Synup Social vs. HeyOrca
hero_summary: Social media is tough. That’s why you need a social media management platform that works for you. HeyOrca gives your business rudimentary scheduling and analytics, but it’s not adding to your efforts. Synup Social empowers your team to collaborate with its revolutionary approval workflows. Plus, Synup Social is a collaborator itself, providing your team with everything from post ideas and optimization to approval workflows and advanced analytics.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: To win customers and drive engagement, your social media strategy needs to be backed by data. HeyOrca provides great scheduling and automation support across platforms, but it lacks the collaborative abilities and robust backend analytics that empower you to create and enact impactful social media strategies. Synup Social’s post-by-post engagement analytics coupled with its AI-powered platform empower to build a content strategy on real data and execute it with ease. Pair these with Synup Social’s revolutionary collaboration and approval workflows, and your productivity will skyrocket! Let’s break it down:
section_2_slider_1_summary: With Synup Social, you can see post-by-post insights, telling you which posts are driving engagement over time. Then, use AI to create more of what works - that’s what we call a recipe for success! The proof is in the numbers; check your ROI right on the analytics dashboard. You can also generate reports straight from Synup Social, saving you even more time in the long run.
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: Synup Social helps you create your best posts. Synup Social shows you relevant trends in your vertical, revives and remixes your best posts, and even writes posts in your brand’s distinct voice. Powered by AI, Synup Social helps you figure out an iron-clad posting strategy. Synup Social researches trends and makes data-backed suggestions, empowering you to create your best posts ever.
section_2_step_3_summary: Collaboration and communication are key! But HeyOrca has no approval workflows, forcing you to take collaboration offline. Friction like this costs precious time and energy, even for the most agile and efficient teams. Luckily, Synup Social empowers supervisors to easily approve posts and even provide feedback directly on the platform, speeding up scheduling and streamlining your overall workflow!
section_2_slider_4_summary: HeyOrca only has rudimentary support for multi-location businesses, turning a single post into a huge chore. Plus, they don’t offer multi-brand support, making the platform a no-go for agencies. Synup Social’s platform is built for multi-location and multi-brand post scheduling, making it simple to manage ten or ten thousand profiles all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sendible?
why_choose_tab_title_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_heading: What do users love about Synup Social?
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: While HeyOrca and Synup Social are both great social media management platforms, Synup Social stands out due to its collaborative workflows, AI-powered post generation, user-friendly platform, and multi-location capabilities. Synup Social boosts your efficiency, helping you do more with less! Let’s see how they compare:
